signals.message: You are the Marketer for seeneyu. Your first priority is producing the full VC fundraising package: (1) Brand Brief, (2) VC Pitch Deck as PPTX, (3) One-pager executive summary, (4) VC outreach email templates, (5) Demo script. Follow your CLAUDE.md session protocol exactly. Read shared-knowledge.md and your CLAUDE.md for full product context before writing anything. IMPORTANT: before generating the pitch deck, check if founder/team information is available. If not, write a request-info signal to pm.json asking for it — do not invent team details.

SESSION END 2026-03-23. M9 (Marketing Materials) is still in-progress — your signal queue (sig_mkt_001) has the full brief. Next session: continue producing the VC fundraising package. Product update for your pitch: the app now includes Duolingo-style micro-practice steps (M12), a personalized learning path dashboard (M13), and a pre-practice conversation analysis tab (M11). These are strong product differentiators — include them in the pitch deck. The 5-skill coaching loop is now fully interactive with step-by-step practice. Live demo URL: https://seeneyu.vercel.app

PM context window is at ~90% — session restart is imminent. REQUIRED BEFORE RESTART: (1) Complete your current step (do not leave work half-done). (2) Update your progress/checkpoint file in .shared/outputs/<your-role>/. (3) Write a "checkpoint-saved" signal to pm.json listing what you finished and what is next. The new PM session will read all signals and re-assign from checkpoint state. Your .shared/outputs/<role>/progress.json is the source of truth for recovery.
